text:
Wong Ho (ウォン＝ホー, Won Hō) Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 202) is a former Greed Island player. Gon and his group meet him outside the spell card shop in Masadora. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 151 

Appearance

Wong Ho is a short, stockily built man. He has black hair and eyes with thick eyebrows. He wore a brown vest over a long-sleeved white shirt and black pants. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Desperate to get out of the game, he exchanges a rare card with Gon for a "Leave" card in front of the spell card shop in Masadora. 

Wong Ho's name is mentioned in Gon's binder. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Wong Ho is capable of utilizing Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Though Wong Ho's name is technically given in the manga through Gon's Greed Island binder, the correspondence between the character and his name is only provided in the Hunter's Guide databook. 

Manga and Anime Differences

Wong Ho does not appear in the 1999 anime adaptation.
